Data files are available for the following models:
Accountable Health Communities (AHC) Model - This model addressed a critical gap between clinical care and community services in the current health care delivery system by testing whether systematically identifying and addressing the health-related social needs of Medicare and Medicaid beneficiaries through screening, referral,
